item.title: U.S. Women's National Team v Japan presented by Allstate
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Lumen Field, 800 Occidental Ave S, Seattle, WA

* Event Info Text: Fans age 2 and older will require a ticket. There will be no re-entry. Prices are subject to change. U.S. Soccer prefers Visa. For more info visit ussoccer.com. This event only allows mobile as a delivery method. All fans age 2 and older require a ticket. Prices subject to change, all sales are final. U.S. Soccer prefers Visa. For questions regarding group/suite tickets please email us at tickets@ussoccer.org.

Event details

item.title: Seattle Sounders FC vs. Tigres UANL
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 8:30 PM

Location: Lumen Field, 800 Occidental Ave S, Seattle, WA

A clear bag policy is enforced by Lumen Field and Sounders FC for all Sounders FC matches. You may carry a clear tote no larger than 12" x 6" x 12" or a small clutch or purse no larger than 4.5" x 6.5".

Event details
